questions.question: Describe the time complexity of the Bubble Sort algorithm. How does it compare to the Selection Sort algorithm? Provide an example to support your answer.
questions.hint: Focus on the Big O notation and compare the worst-case scenarios of both algorithms.

questions.question: Write a step-by-step algorithm for the Selection Sort method to sort an array of integers in ascending order. Provide space complexity and a sample input to test your implementation.
questions.hint: Use a structured format to present your solution, including variable declarations and loop conditions.

questions.question: Suppose we have an array of 10 integers, where the largest element is at the end. Describe how to apply the Bubble Sort algorithm to achieve this goal. Highlight any edge cases and discuss potential optimisation techniques.
questions.hint: Focus on the initial pass through the array and discuss how the algorithm adapts to the input data.
